src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.general_idea: Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation equivalents to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace used in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.why_exists: javax.validation package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist'.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.general_idea: Replace javax.validation with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE namespace migration in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' on JDK 17+ with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.general_idea: Update exception import path to match new service layer package structure.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.why_exists: Class moved to new package; code fails to compile with 'cannot find symbol' for InvalidRecommendationException.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.general_idea: Refactor controller to use new DTOs and service method signatures.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.why_exists: Service API changed; code fails to compile due to missing methods or incompatible types.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.before: ExpertState addExpert(@RequestBody @Valid Expert expert) { long id = service.add(expert); return new ExpertState(id); }
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.after: NewExpert addExpert(@RequestBody @Valid CreateExpertDto expert) { long id = service.addExpert(expert); return new NewExpert(id); }

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on Spring Boot 3.x / Java 21.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 6 API changes.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter was removed in Spring Security 6; extending it causes a compile error.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.before: public class ActuatorBasicSecurityConfig extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter { ... protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception { ... } }
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.after: public class ActuatorBasicSecurityConfig { ... @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http, ...) throws Exception { ... return http ... .build(); } }

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Migrate authorization configuration from authorizeRequests to authorizeHttpRequests.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: authorizeRequests() was removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with requestMatchers for URL pattern matching.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: antMatchers() was removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Update httpBasic configuration to use the new Customizer API.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: The fluent builder for httpBasic() changed in Spring Security 6; the old chaining style may not compile or behave as expected without the new API.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Update session management configuration to use the new lambda-based API.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: The fluent builder for sessionManagement() changed in Spring Security 6; the old chaining style is incompatible.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Update CSRF configuration to use the new AbstractHttpConfigurer disable method.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: The fluent builder for csrf() changed in Spring Security 6; the old .disable() chaining is incompatible.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Update import path for the Books class to reflect its new location in the service.dto package.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: Compile error: class com.xpinjection.library.domain.Books cannot be found or resolved.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Updated the import statement for the Books class to reflect a package restructuring from domain to service.dto.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol class Books in package com.xpinjection.library.domain

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.general_idea: Migrate javax.validation import to jakarta.validation to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/co.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on JDK 17+ with Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/do.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/com/xpinjection/library/do.why_exists: javax.persistence classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/test/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.general_idea: Update import for LocalServerPort to match Spring Boot 3 package structure.
src/test/java/com/xpinjection/library/ad.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.web.server.LocalServerPort was removed in Spring Boot 3; using the old import causes a compile error.
